# KOVO-KUKY

> Precision CNC machining, turning, and milling company based in Dolní Bukovsko, Czech Republic. Reliable B2B supplier for automotive and machinery industries.

## Core Services
- **CNC Turning**: High-precision turning of metal components.
- **CNC Milling**: 3-axis and advanced milling operations.
- **Material Cutting**: In-house material preparation and sawing.
- **Surface Treatments**: Coordination of galvanizing, painting, and coating via certified partners.

## Business Profile
- **Location**: Veselská 59, 373 65 Dolní Bukovsko, South Bohemia.
- **Key Clients**: Richmont (CZ), ETA (Austria).
- **Target Markets**: Automotive, Engineering, Industrial Manufacturing.
- **Specialization**: Serial and custom production with tolerances up to 0.01 mm.

## Technical Specifications
- Materials: Steel, Stainless Steel, Aluminum, Brass.
- Equipment: Modern CNC machine park (Doosan, etc.).
- Lead Times: Quotations typically within 48 hours.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://www.kovokuky.cz
- Email: info@kovokuky.cz
- Phone: +420 725 770 820
- Language Support: Czech, English.
